product: External lineage is now generally available ​
tagline: June 8, 2026 External lineage (formerly Bring Your Own Lineage) in Unity Catalog is now generally available.
what_it_does: June 8, 2026 External lineage (formerly Bring Your Own Lineage) in Unity Catalog is now generally available. You can register assets that live outside Databricks, such as Salesforce or MySQL sources and Tableau or Power BI dashboards, so that a single lineage graph spans your full data flow.
why_it_matters: See [External lineage](/aws/en/data governance/unity catalog/external lineage) and [Track source data lineage for managed ingestion pipelines](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow connect/source lineage).

capabilities.title: June 8, 2026 External
capabilities.desc: June 8, 2026 External lineage (formerly Bring Your Own Lineage) in Unity Catalog is now generally available.
